parameters.jsCode:
const rows = $input.all().map(i => ({
  ct_iwine: i.json.ct_iwine,
  wine: i.json.wine,
  vintage: i.json.vintage,
  producer: i.json.producer,
  wine_type: i.json.wine_type,
  varietal: i.json.varietal,
  master_varietal: i.json.master_varietal,
  designation: i.json.designation,
  vineyard: i.json.vineyard,
  appellation: i.json.appellation,
  region: i.json.region,
  sub_region: i.json.sub_region,
  country: i.json.country,
  locale: i.json.locale,
  bottle_size: i.json.bottle_size,
  drink_from: i.json.drink_from,
  drink_to: i.json.drink_to,
  my_notes: i.json.my_notes,
  note_date: i.json.note_date,
  embedding: i.json.embedding
}));
return [{ json: { rows, count: rows.length } }];

const rows = $('Parse CSV + Merge Notes').all().map(i => ({
  ct_barcode: i.json.ct_barcode,
  ct_iwine: i.json.ct_iwine,
  bottle_state: i.json.bottle_state,
  location: i.json.location,
  bin: i.json.bin,
  store: i.json.store,
  purchase_date: i.json.purchase_date,
  delivery_date: i.json.delivery_date,
  bottle_cost: i.json.bottle_cost,
  bottle_cost_currency: i.json.bottle_cost_currency,
  bottle_note: i.json.bottle_note,
  purchase_note: i.json.purchase_note,
  consumption_date: i.json.consumption_date,
  consumption_type: i.json.consumption_type,
  consumption_note: i.json.consumption_note,
  consumption_revenue: i.json.consumption_revenue,
  consumption_revenue_currency: i.json.consumption_revenue_currency,
  removed_at: null,
  last_synced_at: i.json.last_synced_at,
  raw_ct_row: i.json.raw_ct_row
}));
return [{ json: { rows, count: rows.length } }];
